name: WestRock
description: WestRock is a leader in sustainable packaging solutions and offers KraftPak® Paperboard, which is an uncoated, unbleached kraft paperboard that provides strength and durability while using less fiber. This product aligns with WestRock's commitment to innovation and sustainability, making it a relevant choice for those seeking kraft paper solutions.

name: Macfarlane Packaging
description: Macfarlane Packaging offers a variety of kraft paper products, including brown kraft paper rolls and ribbed kraft options, designed to enhance the protection of your items during storage and transit. With a commitment to sustainability and continuous improvement, the company provides reliable packaging solutions that can help reduce costs and improve efficiency.

name: Saffron Industries
description: Saffron Industries (SIL) is a leading manufacturer of Kraft Paper, with over two decades of expertise in producing high-quality products. The company is dedicated to delivering unmatched quality at affordable prices, continuously enhancing its production processes to meet customer needs.

name: Twin Rivers Paper Company
description: The company specializes in high-quality specialty paper, including innovative packaging solutions that may encompass kraft paper products. Their focus on sustainability and advanced technical features aligns with the growing demand for functional and eco-friendly packaging options.

name: Canadian Kraft Paper
description: Canadian Kraft Paper is a leading global supplier of high-performance unbleached sack kraft paper, known for its strong and consistent quality. Their products are designed to meet the rigorous demands of modern packaging requirements.

name: International Paper
description: International Paper is a prominent global manufacturer of renewable fiber-based products, including pulp and sustainable packaging solutions. Their commitment to sustainable practices and innovative products aligns with the growing demand for environmentally friendly materials.

name: Starkraft
description: Starkraft is a leading manufacturer of kraft paper, producing a variety of products like bags and wrapping paper, as well as composite packaging for various applications. Their advanced technology and experienced team ensure high-quality kraft papers that meet specific customer requirements.

name: RP Paper Impex (P) Limited
description: RP Paper Impex is a leading manufacturer and exporter of kraft paper, specifically for bags, offering a wide range of products in various sizes and GSMs. With a strong commitment to quality and a vast supply chain network, they ensure above-market standards for their kraft paper products.

name: Maxpack | Protecting Your Production
description: The company offers Pure Kraft Paper Rolls, which are made from strong, unbleached pure wood pulp, providing a durable and tear-resistant wrapping material. These rolls are ideal for applications where strength and presentation are important.

name: Graphic Packaging
description: Graphic Packaging International specializes in paper-based packaging, including their ProducePack™ line, which offers sustainable paper packaging solutions for fresh fruit and vegetables. Their commitment to renewable and recyclable materials highlights their focus on environmentally friendly packaging options.
